title: tephroseris integrifolia subsp. tundricola
intro: Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. tundricola, also known as Tundric Mountain Everlasting, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tephroseris integrifolia subsp. tundricola include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried forms for medicinal use, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
